titleStmt.title: SII 25.174: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 174. (A.R. No. 174 of 1908.) TIRUNAṞAIYŪR, KUMBAKONAM TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Siddhanāthasvāmi temple.
This incomplete epigraph commences with the praśasti, Pūmādupuṇara, etc., of the king.

It records the grant of iṟaiyili lands by Sembiyaṉ Mādēvi-pirāṭṭiyār for the mid-day worship of the deity Vaḍavāyil Mātta-piḍāriyār of Pañchavaṉmādēvich-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Tirunaṟaiyūr-nāḍu in Kulōttuṅgaśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu. The karaṇi-gaṇattār, evidently of the village, undertook to supply 7 nāḻi of paddy and to maintain the endowment. The lands endowed as iṟaiyili was the capital for the said offering and the karaṇattāṉ of the village Mādanamaṅgalam-uḍaiyān Dēvaṉ Ādimūrtthi was empowered to manage the gift as a representative (magaṉ) of karaṇi-gaṇattār. He has to pay the taravu for the antarāyam collected annually on these lands and that after him, his descendants and those who held the office should pay the same.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmātu puṇara puvimātu vaḷara nāmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu nilava tantiruppatu malar mannavar cūṭa manniya Urimaiyāl maṇimuṭi cūṭi ceṅkOl ceṉṟu ticaitoṟum vaḷaṟppa veṅkali niṅki meyyaṟan taḻaippak kaliṅka miriya kaṭalmalai naṭātti valaṅkoḷāḻi varaiyāḻi naṭātti Iricuṭaraḷavum Oru kuṭainiḻaṟṟa virasiṅhāsanattu
tiripuvaṉa muḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya koppara kecaripanmarāna tiripuvanacakkaravattikaḷ śrīvikkiramacoḻa tevaṟkku yāṇṭu 10 2āvatu kulottuṅkacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu tirunaṟaiyūr nāṭṭu pañcavaṉmātevic caruppetimaṅkalattu perumāḷ tirumeni kalliyāṇa tirumeniyāka pūjai koṇṭaruḷikiṟa vaṭavāyil māttapiṭāriyarkku cantirātittavaṟ celvatāka Uccisantikku muṉpu viṭṭuva
rukiṟapaṭikku meleṟṟi Amutupaṭikku Arici Irunāḻikkum kaṟiyamutu neyyamutu tayiramutu Uppamutu miḷakamutu Aṭaikkāyamutu Ilaiyamutu tiruviḷakku Uḷpaṭa san=ti Oṉṟukku nellu Eḻunāḻiyāka Ēṟṟi karaṇikaṇattāre Iṉnimantañ celuttak kaṭavārkaḷākavum Innimantattukku Uṭalāka Ivvūr karaṇattāṉ mātāṉa maṅkalamuṭaiyān tevaṉ Ātimurtti Ikkaraṇikaṇattārkku makanāy Ippiṭāriyarkku Iṟaiyiliyāka cempiyaṉ mātevip pirāṭ
ṭiyār koṇṭuviṭṭa Iṟaiyili pavittiramaāṇikkavatikku kiḻakku rājentraṉ vāykkālukku vaṭakku mutaṟkaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟ catirattu nilaṅkāle mukkāṇic ciṉnattukkum Oṭṭina An=tarāyam Āṭṭāṇṭu toṟum Ivan taṉ kaṇakku jivitattile kuṇṭikaiyilevaittu taravukoḷḷak kaṭavutākavum Ivaṉukku piṉpu Ivaṉ vaṟkattārum maṟṟum IyarvācilRead ivar vārcilIvvūr Ūṟkkaṇakkeḻutināre tantām jivitattile InContinuation not traceable.
Digital edition of SII 25.174 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
